title: Xpeng Earnings Beat by ¥0.32, Revenue Fell Short of Estimates
text: XPeng reported earnings that beat expectations but revenue fell short of estimates in the most recent quarter. The company posted a loss of just $0.06 per share, beating expectations by $0.04. However, revenue came in at $2.87B, missing expectations by $5.73M. Investor sentiment deteriorated following a weaker-than-expected Q1 revenue outlook, with revenue guidance between 12.2B and 13.28B RMB falling short of the FactSet consensus estimate, causing a share price decrease of over 7%. The mixed results highlighted the tension between improving profitability metrics and slowing revenue growth expectations.
